localize.text: Miss Neuro. It has been done.
The last Sephirot of Atziluth has been suppressed, and the stage is set for the finale.
It is funny. We manage Abnormalities here, but nothing happening was abnormal to me.
The script was all laid out clearly; I had no fantasies of anything unexpected occurring.
I wish I had more time to talk with you like this. To discuss our lives, our thoughts...
Even trivial things, like our favourite types of books.
But perhaps it is for the best. I would have to carry those memories with me, long after you left.
For now, we should focus on finishing this for good. After all...there is still one last department left to expand.
These final scenes of this play will be more difficult than everything else thus far.
Do you think you can handle it?
Let's finish this, so we may continue living life.
I suppose you could go back to the start one last time if you need more time to prepare.
But...somehow...I think you can do it.
At the very least, you won't surrender your life that easily, will you?
